steps.title: Test each table
steps.content: For the shared $x$-values, the boundary values are $$4(2)+8=16,$$ $$4(4)+8=24,$$ and $$4(6)+8=32.$$ The listed $y$-values must be greater than $16$, $24$, and $32$, respectively.

steps.title: Identify the table
steps.content: Choice A has $y$-values $19$, $30$, and $41$, and each is greater than the matching boundary value: $$19>16,$$ $$30>24,$$ and $$41>32.$$ The other tables fail at least one row, so choice A is correct.
